# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download (supports S3, Artifactory, HTTP/HTTPS)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of production server hostnames/IPs to deploy to'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app/deployments',
            description: 'Target deployment directory on production servers'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_USER',
            defaultValue: 'deploy',
            description: 'SSH user for deployment to production servers'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'SSH credentials for connecting to production servers',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.jenkins.plugins.sshcredentials.impl.BasicSSHUserPrivateKey'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Credentials for Artifactory authentication (optional)',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials.impl.UsernamePasswordCredentialsImpl'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'AWS credentials for S3 access (optional)',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.jenkins.plugins.awscredentials.AmazonWebServicesCredentials'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'VERIFY_CHECKSUMS',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Verify artifact checksums after download'
        )
        string(
            name: 'CHECKSUM_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of checksum file URLs (same order as ARTIFACT_URLS). Leave empty to skip verification.'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'BACKUP_EXISTING',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Backup existing artifacts on production servers before deploying'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Perform a dry run without actual deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional script to run on each server before deployment (e.g., stop services)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional script to run on each server after deployment (e.g., start services, health check)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional health check URL to verify deployment success (e.g., http://{server}:8080/health)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT',
            defaultValue: '120',
            description: 'Health check timeout in seconds'
        )
    }

    environment {
        ARTIFACTS_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        CHECKSUMS_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/checksums"
        DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: 'date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S', returnStdout: true).trim()
        BUILD_MANIFEST = "${WORKSPACE}/deployment_manifest.json"
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        ansiColor('xterm')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=========================================="
                    echo "  Artifact Deployment Pipeline"
                    echo "=========================================="
                    echo "Deployment Timestamp: ${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}"

                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URLS?.trim()) {
                        error "ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required. Please provide at least one artifact URL."
                    }
                    if (!params.DEPLOY_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error "DEPLOY_SERVERS parameter is required. Please provide at least one target server."
                    }

                    env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.trim()
                    env.SERVER_LIST = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.trim()

                    def urls = env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    echo "Artifacts to download (${urls.size()}):"
                    urls.eachWithIndex { url, idx ->
                        echo "  [${idx + 1}] ${url}"
                    }

                    echo "Target servers (${servers.size()}):"
                    servers.eachWithIndex { server, idx ->
                        echo "  [${idx + 1}] ${server}"
                    }

                    echo "Deploy path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                    echo "Deploy user: ${params.DEPLOY_USER}"
                    echo "Backup existing: ${params.BACKUP_EXISTING}"
                    echo "Verify checksums: ${params.VERIFY_CHECKSUMS}"
                    echo "Dry run: ${params.DRY_RUN}"

                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "*** DRY RUN MODE - No actual deployment will be performed ***"
                    }

                    // Validate URLs
                    urls.each { url ->
                        if (!url.matches('^(https?://|s3://).*')) {
                            error "Invalid artifact URL: ${url}. Must start with http://, https://, or s3://"
                        }
                    }

                    // Validate checksum URLs count matches artifact URLs if provided
                    if (params.VERIFY_CHECKSUMS && params.CHECKSUM_URLS?.trim()) {
                        def checksumUrls = params.CHECKSUM_URLS.trim().split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                        if (checksumUrls.size() != urls.size()) {
                            error "Number of checksum URLs (${checksumUrls.size()}) must match number of artifact URLs (${urls.size()})"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh """
                        rm -rf ${ARTIFACTS_DIR} ${CHECKSUMS_DIR}
                        mkdir -p ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
                        mkdir -p ${CHECKSUMS_DIR}
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def downloadResults = [:]

                    urls.eachWithIndex { url, idx ->
                        def filename = url.tokenize('/').last()
                        // Remove query parameters from filename
                        filename = filename.split('\\?')[0]
                        def targetPath = "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${filename}"

                        echo "Downloading artifact [${idx + 1}/${urls.size()}]: ${url}"
                        echo "  Target: ${targetPath}"

                        try {
                            if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                                downloadFromS3(url, targetPath)
                            } else if (url.contains('artifactory') || url.contains('jfrog')) {
                                downloadFromArtifactory(url, targetPath)
                            } else {
                                downloadFromHTTP(url, targetPath)
                            }

                            // Verify file was downloaded
                            def fileSize = sh(script: "stat -c%s '${targetPath}' 2>/dev/null || echo 0", returnStdout: true).trim()
                            if (fileSize == '0') {
                                error "Downloaded file is empty: ${targetPath}"
                            }

                            echo "  Downloaded successfully (${formatFileSize(fileSize.toLong())})"
                            downloadResults[filename] = [
                                url: url,
                                path: targetPath,
                                size: fileSize,
                                status: 'SUCCESS'
                            ]
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            downloadResults[filename] = [
                                url: url,
                                path: targetPath,
                                size: '0',
                                status: 'FAILED',
                                error: e.message
                            ]
                            error "Failed to download artifact from ${url}: ${e.message}"
                        }
                    }

                    env.DOWNLOAD_RESULTS = groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(downloadResults)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Checksums') {
            when {
                expression { params.VERIFY_CHECKSUMS && params.CHECKSUM_URLS?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def checksumUrls = params.CHECKSUM_URLS.trim().split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    checksumUrls.eachWithIndex { url, idx ->
                        def filename = url.tokenize('/').last().split('\\?')[0]
                        def targetPath = "${CHECKSUMS_DIR}/${filename}"

                        echo "Downloading checksum [${idx + 1}/${checksumUrls.size()}]: ${url}"

                        try {
                            if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                                downloadFromS3(url, targetPath)
                            } else if (url.contains('artifactory') || url.contains('jfrog')) {
                                downloadFromArtifactory(url, targetPath)
                            } else {
                                downloadFromHTTP(url, targetPath)
                            }
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            error "Failed to download checksum from ${url}: ${e.message}"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Checksums') {
            when {
                expression { params.VERIFY_CHECKSUMS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactFiles = sh(script: "ls -1 ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n')

                    if (params.CHECKSUM_URLS?.trim()) {
                        // Verify using provided checksum files
                        echo "Verifying artifacts against provided checksum files..."
                        def checksumFiles = sh(script: "ls -1 ${CHECKSUMS_DIR}/", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n')

                        checksumFiles.each { checksumFile ->
                            def checksumPath = "${CHECKSUMS_DIR}/${checksumFile}"
                            def checksumContent = readFile(checksumPath).trim()

                            echo "Verifying with checksum file: ${checksumFile}"
                            echo "  Checksum content: ${checksumContent}"

                            // Try to determine checksum type and verify
                            def verified = false

                            // Try SHA256
                            if (checksumContent.length() == 64 || checksumFile.endsWith('.sha256')) {
                                def expectedHash = checksumContent.split('\\s+')[0]
                                artifactFiles.each { artifact ->
                                    def actualHash = sh(
                                        script: "sha256sum ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${artifact} | awk '{print \$1}'",
                                        returnStdout: true
                                    ).trim()
                                    if (actualHash == expectedHash) {
                                        echo "  SHA256 verified for ${artifact}: ${actualHash}"
                                        verified = true
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            // Try SHA1
                            if (!verified && (checksumContent.length() == 40 || checksumFile.endsWith('.sha1'))) {
                                def expectedHash = checksumContent.split('\\s+')[0]
                                artifactFiles.each { artifact ->
                                    def actualHash = sh(
                                        script: "sha1sum ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${artifact} | awk '{print \$1}'",
                                        returnStdout: true
                                    ).trim()
                                    if (actualHash == expectedHash) {
                                        echo "  SHA1 verified for ${artifact}: ${actualHash}"
                                        verified = true
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            // Try MD5
                            if (!verified && (checksumContent.length() == 32 || checksumFile.endsWith('.md5'))) {
                                def expectedHash = checksumContent.split('\\s+')[0]
                                artifactFiles.each { artifact ->
                                    def actualHash = sh(
                                        script: "md5sum ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${artifact} | awk '{print \$1}'",
                                        returnStdout: true
                                    ).trim()
                                    if (actualHash == expectedHash) {
                                        echo "  MD5 verified for ${artifact}: ${actualHash}"
                                        verified = true
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            if (!verified) {
                                error "Checksum verification failed for checksum file: ${checksumFile}"
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        // Generate checksums for record-keeping
                        echo "No checksum URLs provided. Generating checksums for audit purposes..."
                        artifactFiles.each { artifact ->
                            def sha256 = sh(
                                script: "sha256sum ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${artifact}",
                                returnStdout: true
                            ).trim()
                            echo "  SHA256: ${sha256}"
                        }
                    }

                    echo "Checksum verification completed successfully."
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Generate Deployment Manifest') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactFiles = sh(script: "ls -1 ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n')
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    def manifest = [
                        deployment_id: "${env.BUILD_NUMBER}_${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}",
                        timestamp: DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP,
                        triggered_by: currentBuild.getBuildCauses()[0]?.userId ?: 'system',
                        dry_run: params.DRY_RUN,
                        artifacts: [],
                        target_servers: servers,
                        deploy_path: params.DEPLOY_PATH,
                        backup_enabled: params.BACKUP_EXISTING
                    ]

                    artifactFiles.each { artifact ->
                        def sha256 = sh(
                            script: "sha256sum ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${artifact} | awk '{print \$1}'",
                            returnStdout: true
                        ).trim()
                        def size = sh(
                            script: "stat -c%s ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${artifact}",
                            returnStdout: true
                        ).trim()

                        manifest.artifacts << [
                            filename: artifact,
                            sha256: sha256,
                            size: size
                        ]
                    }

                    def manifestJson = groovy.json.JsonOutput.prettyPrint(groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(manifest))
                    writeFile file: BUILD_MANIFEST, text: manifestJson
                    echo "Deployment Manifest:\n${manifestJson}"

                    archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'deployment_manifest.json', fingerprint: true
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            when {
                expression { !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def artifactFiles = sh(script: "ls -1 ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n')
                    def deploymentResults = [:]
                    def failedServers = []

                    // Deploy to each server sequentially (rolling deployment)
                    servers.eachWithIndex { server, serverIdx ->
                        echo "=========================================="
                        echo "Deploying to server [${serverIdx + 1}/${servers.size()}]: ${server}"
                        echo "=========================================="

                        try {
                            sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                                // Test SSH connectivity
                                echo "Testing connectivity to ${server}..."
                                sh """
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                                        ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} 'echo "Connection successful"'
                                """

                                // Run pre-deployment script if provided
                                if (params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT?.trim()) {
                                    echo "Running pre-deployment script on ${server}..."
                                    sh """
                                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                            ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '${params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}'
                                    """
                                    echo "Pre-deployment script completed on ${server}"
                                }

                                // Create deployment directory
                                sh """
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                        ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} \
                                        'mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}'
                                """

                                // Backup existing artifacts if enabled
                                if (params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
                                    echo "Backing up existing deployment on ${server}..."
                                    sh """
                                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                            ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} \
                                            'if [ -d ${params.DEPLOY_PATH} ] && [ "\$(ls -A ${params.DEPLOY_PATH} 2>/dev/null)" ]; then \
                                                backup_dir="${params.DEPLOY_PATH}_backup_${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}"; \
                                                mkdir -p \${backup_dir}; \
                                                cp -a ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/* \${backup_dir}/ 2>/dev/null || true; \
                                                echo "Backup created at \${backup_dir}"; \
                                                # Keep only last 5 backups \
                                                ls -dt ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}_backup_* 2>/dev/null | tail -n +6 | xargs rm -rf 2>/dev/null || true; \
                                            else \
                                                echo "No existing artifacts to backup"; \
                                            fi'
                                    """
                                }

                                // Transfer artifacts
                                artifactFiles.each { artifact ->
                                    echo "Transferring ${artifact} to ${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/"
                                    sh """
                                        scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                            ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${artifact} \
                                            ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/
                                    """
                                }

                                // Transfer deployment manifest
                                sh """
                                    scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                        ${BUILD_MANIFEST} \
                                        ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/
                                """

                                // Verify transferred files
                                echo "Verifying deployed artifacts on ${server}..."
                                artifactFiles.each { artifact ->
                                    def localChecksum = sh(
                                        script: "sha256sum ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${artifact} | awk '{print \$1}'",
                                        returnStdout: true
                                    ).trim()

                                    def remoteChecksum = sh(
                                        script: """
                                            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                                ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} \
                                                'sha256sum ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${artifact} | awk "{print \\\$1}"'
                                        """,
                                        returnStdout: true
                                    ).trim()

                                    if (localChecksum != remoteChecksum) {
                                        error "Checksum mismatch for ${artifact} on ${server}! Local: ${localChecksum}, Remote: ${remoteChecksum}"
                                    }
                                    echo "  Verified ${artifact}: ${localChecksum}"
                                }

                                // Set permissions
                                sh """
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                        ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} \
                                        'chmod 644 ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/* && \
                                         find ${params.DEPLOY_PATH} -name "*.sh" -exec chmod 755 {} \\; 2>/dev/null || true && \
                                         find ${params.DEPLOY_PATH} -name "*.jar" -exec chmod 644 {} \\; 2>/dev/null || true && \
                                         find ${params.DEPLOY_PATH} -name "*.war" -exec chmod 644 {} \\; 2>/dev/null || true'
                                """

                                // Run post-deployment script if provided
                                if (params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT?.trim()) {
                                    echo "Running post-deployment script on ${server}..."
                                    sh """
                                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                            ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '${params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}'
                                    """
                                    echo "Post-deployment script completed on ${server}"
                                }
                            }

                            deploymentResults[server] = 'SUCCESS'
                            echo "Deployment to ${server} completed successfully."

                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            deploymentResults[server] = "FAILED: ${e.message}"
                            failedServers << server
                            echo "ERROR: Deployment to ${server} failed: ${e.message}"

                            // Attempt rollback on failed server
                            if (params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
                                echo "Attempting rollback on ${server}..."
                                try {
                                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                                        sh """
                                            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                                ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} \
                                                'backup_dir="${params.DEPLOY_PATH}_backup_${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}"; \
                                                 if [ -d \${backup_dir} ]; then \
                                                     rm -rf ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/*; \
                                                     cp -a \${backup_dir}/* ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/ 2>/dev/null || true; \
                                                     echo "Rollback completed from \${backup_dir}"; \
                                                 else \
                                                     echo "No backup found for rollback"; \
                                                 fi'
                                        """
                                    }
                                    echo "Rollback completed on ${server}"
                                } catch (Exception rollbackEx) {
                                    echo "WARNING: Rollback failed on ${server}: ${rollbackEx.message}"
                                }
                            }

                            // Stop deployment to remaining servers on failure
                            error "Stopping rolling deployment due to failure on ${server}. Failed servers: ${failedServers}"
                        }
                    }

                    // Summary
                    echo "\n=========================================="
                    echo "  Deployment Summary"
                    echo "=========================================="
                    deploymentResults.each { server, result ->
                        echo "  ${server}: ${result}"
                    }

                    if (failedServers) {
                        error "Deployment failed on servers: ${failedServers.join(', ')}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Health Check') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { !params.DRY_RUN }
                    expression { params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL?.trim() }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def timeout = params.HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT?.toInteger() ?: 120
                    def failedHealthChecks = []

                    servers.each { server ->
                        def healthUrl = params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL.replace('{server}', server)
                        echo "Running health check for ${server}: ${healthUrl}"

                        def healthy = false
                        def startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
                        def endTime = startTime + (timeout * 1000)

                        while (System.currentTimeMillis() < endTime && !healthy) {
                            try {
                                def response = sh(
                                    script: "curl -sf -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --connect-timeout 5 --max-time 10 '${healthUrl}'",
                                    returnStdout: true
                                ).trim()

                                if (response == '200') {
                                    healthy = true
                                    def elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000
                                    echo "  ${server}: Health check passed (${elapsed}s)"
                                } else {
                                    echo "  ${server}: Health check returned ${response}, retrying..."
                                    sleep(5)
                                }
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "  ${server}: Health check failed, retrying in 5s..."
                                sleep(5)
                            }
                        }

                        if (!healthy) {
                            failedHealthChecks << server
                            echo "  ERROR: Health check timed out for ${server} after ${timeout}s"
                        }
                    }

                    if (failedHealthChecks) {
                        error "Health check failed for servers: ${failedHealthChecks.join(', ')}"
                    }

                    echo "All health checks passed successfully."
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Dry Run Summary') {
            when {
                expression { params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def artifactFiles = sh(script: "ls -1 ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n')

                    echo "\n=========================================="
                    echo "  DRY RUN SUMMARY"
                    echo "=========================================="
                    echo "The following actions would be performed:"
                    echo ""
                    echo "Artifacts to deploy:"
                    artifactFiles.each { artifact ->
                        def size = sh(script: "stat -c%s ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${artifact}", returnStdout: true).trim()
                        echo "  - ${artifact} (${formatFileSize(size.toLong())})"
                    }
                    echo ""
                    echo "Target servers:"
                    servers.each { server ->
                        echo "  - ${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/"
                    }
                    echo ""
                    echo "Backup existing: ${params.BACKUP_EXISTING}"
                    if (params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT?.trim()) {
                        echo "Pre-deploy script: ${params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
                    }
                    if (params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT?.trim()) {
                        echo "Post-deploy script: ${params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
                    }
                    if (params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL?.trim()) {
                        echo "Health check URL: ${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL}"
                    }
                    echo ""
                    echo "No changes were made. Run again with DRY_RUN=false to deploy."
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            script {
                if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                    echo "Dry run completed successfully."
                } else {
                    echo "Deployment completed successfully to all servers."
                }
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "Deployment pipeline failed. Check the logs for details."
                // Could add notification integration here (Slack, email, etc.)
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                // Clean up downloaded artifacts from workspace
                sh "rm -rf ${ARTIFACTS_DIR} ${CHECKSUMS_DIR}"
                echo "Workspace cleaned up."
            }
        }
    }
}

// =============================================
// Helper Functions
// =============================================

def downloadFromS3(String s3Url, String targetPath) {
    if (params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
        withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding',
                          credentialsId: params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                          accessKeyVariable: 'AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID',
                          secretKeyVariable: 'AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY']]) {
            sh """
                aws s3 cp '${s3Url}' '${targetPath}' --no-progress
            """
        }
    } else {
        // Rely on instance profile or default credentials
        sh """
            aws s3 cp '${s3Url}' '${targetPath}' --no-progress
        """
    }
}

def downloadFromArtifactory(String url, String targetPath) {
    if (params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
        withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                                          usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_USER',
                                          passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_PASS')]) {
            sh """
                curl -fSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 \
                    -u "\${ARTIFACTORY_USER}:\${ARTIFACTORY_PASS}" \
                    -o '${targetPath}' \
                    '${url}'
            """
        }
    } else {
        sh """
            curl -fSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 \
                -o '${targetPath}' \
                '${url}'
        """
    }
}

def downloadFromHTTP(String url, String targetPath) {
    sh """
        curl -fSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 \
            --connect-timeout 30 \
            --max-time 600 \
            -o '${targetPath}' \
            '${url}'
    """
}

def formatFileSize(long bytes) {
    if (bytes < 1024) return "${bytes} B"
    def units = ['KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB']
    def unitIndex = 0
    double size = bytes / 1024.0
    while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.size() - 1) {
        size /= 1024.0
        unitIndex++
    }
    return String.format("%.2f %s", size, units[unitIndex])
}
